seo.title: Installment vs Cash — Financial Calculator
seo.description: Find out whether it's worth paying in installments or upfront. Calculate the opportunity cost and make the best financial decision.
seo.ogDescription: Free calculator to compare installment payments and lump-sum payments.

faq.q1: How do I know whether to pay in installments or upfront?
faq.a1: Compare the total cost of installments with the return the money would earn if invested. If the return exceeds the interest cost, paying upfront is more advantageous.
faq.a2: It is the value you forgo by tying up your money. By paying upfront, you give up the return that capital would have earned if invested.

hero.title: Installment vs Cash
hero.subtitle: Discover whether it is worth paying in installments or using your cash upfront by factoring in opportunity cost.
hero.featureBasicDesc: Compare installment and lump-sum scenarios without needing an account.
hero.featureAdvancedDesc: With a free account, save simulations and turn them into goals or planned expenses.

seo.title: INSS + Income Tax Calculator — Real Deductions by Bracket
seo.description: Calculate exactly how much INSS and Income Tax are deducted from your salary, bracket by bracket. Includes dependent, alimony and private pension deductions.
seo.ogDescription: Free progressive INSS and income tax calculator with dependent and private pension deductions.

hero.title: INSS + Income Tax on Your Payslip
hero.subtitle: See exactly how much is deducted from your gross salary, bracket by bracket, with all income tax deductions applied.

form.title: Salary details
form.dependentsTooltip: Each dependent reduces the income tax base by R$ 189.59 per month
form.alimentPensionTooltip: Fully deductible from income tax base — requires court or formal document
form.privatePensionTooltip: Deductible up to 12% of annual gross income. Enter your monthly contribution.

disclaimer.tableYear: INSS/IT tables in effect for {year}. Updated annually each January.
disclaimer.privatePensionCapped: Private pension deduction capped at 12% of gross salary.

errors.generic: Please check the values and try again.

seo.title: CLT Overtime Calculator — Gross and Net Value
seo.description: Calculate your CLT overtime pay (50%, 75%, 100%), the INSS impact, and estimated net value.
seo.ogDescription: Free CLT overtime calculator with INSS impact.

hero.title: CLT Overtime Calculator
hero.subtitle: See how much your overtime hours are worth gross and the real INSS impact, per modality (50%, 75%, 100%).

form.title: Calculation data
form.hoursPerMonthTooltip: Standard CLT divisor: 220 h/month (8 h/day × 44 h/week). Use 240 for night shift.
form.hours50Tooltip: Common overtime on weekdays. Legal minimum: 50% over regular rate.
form.hours75Tooltip: Applicable when set by collective agreement (e.g. Sundays).
form.hours100Tooltip: Holidays and cases set by collective agreement or employment contract.

disclaimer.tableYear: INSS table in effect for {year}. Income tax not included — use the INSS+IR calculator for full deductions.
disclaimer.irNotIncluded: Income tax is not included in this calculation as it depends on personal deductions (dependents, private pension, etc.).

errors.hoursPerMonthInvalid: Monthly hours divisor must be greater than zero.
errors.hoursNegative: Number of hours cannot be negative.
errors.noOvertimeHours: Please enter at least one overtime hour in any modality.
errors.generic: Please check the data and try again.

seo.title: CLT Vacation Calculator — Gross, Bonus and Net Value
seo.description: Calculate your CLT vacation pay with the 1/3 constitutional bonus, cash conversion (abono), INSS and income tax.
seo.ogDescription: Free CLT vacation simulator with abono, INSS and income tax.

hero.title: CLT Vacation Simulator
hero.subtitle: Calculate the gross and net value of your vacation pay, including the 1/3 constitutional bonus, abono pecuniário, INSS and income tax.

form.title: Vacation details
form.vacationDaysTooltip: Number of days you will rest. CLT requires at least 20 days if selling the abono, or 10 days in special situations.
form.abonoEnabledTooltip: Converts 1/3 of your vacation (10 days) to cash. Abono is INSS-exempt (STF RE 593.068). Requires at least 20 rest days.
form.overtimeAverageTooltip: Regular payments (overtime, commissions) are included in the vacation base per CLT art. 142.
form.dependentsTooltip: Each dependent reduces the IR base by R$ 189.59.

results.title: Result
results.bestMonthNote: Tip: take vacation outside November and December to avoid stacking with 13th-salary advances and moving into a higher IR bracket.

disclaimer.tableYear: INSS/IR tables in effect for {year}. Updated every January.
disclaimer.abonoExempt: Abono pecuniário is INSS-exempt (STF RE 593.068). Income tax is calculated on total gross minus INSS and deductions.
disclaimer.notLegal: This calculator is for informational purposes. Confirm values with HR or an accountant before your vacation slip is issued.

errors.abonoRequiresMinRestDays: Abono pecuniário requires at least 20 rest days. Select 20 or 30 days.
errors.generic: Please check the data and try again.

seo.title: CLT Severance Pay Calculator — Free Simulator
seo.description: Calculate the gross and net value of your CLT severance: notice period, 13th salary, vacation, FGTS penalty, INSS and income tax.
seo.ogDescription: Simulate your CLT severance pay by termination type, including all components.

hero.title: CLT Severance Pay Calculator
hero.subtitle: Simulate your net severance pay by termination type, including notice period, 13th salary, vacation, FGTS penalty, and INSS/IR deductions.

form.title: Termination details
form.yearsOfServiceTooltip: Full years of service. Determines the proportional notice period (Law 12.506/2011): 30 days + 3 per year, max 90.
form.monthsForVacationTooltip: Months since last vacation anniversary (for proportional vacation). Zero means less than one full month in the new period.
form.hasExpiredVacationTooltip: Check if the employee has a full acquisition period of unused vacation. Corresponds to 30 days + 1/3.
form.fgtsBalanceTooltip: Total FGTS account balance. Check via the FGTS app or CAIXA statement.
form.overtimeAverageTooltip: Average monthly variable pay (overtime, commissions, etc.) included in the severance calculation base.
form.dependentsTooltip: Number of declared dependents for IRRF deduction

disclaimer.tableYear: INSS/IR tables for {year}. Check for annual updates.
disclaimer.avisoPrevioNote: Paid notice period (indenizado) is exempt from INSS (Law 9.528/97) but subject to income tax.
disclaimer.notLegal: This simulator is an estimate. Consult your HR department or a labor attorney for exact amounts.

errors.yearsOfServiceInvalid: Years of service must be a non-negative integer.
errors.daysWorkedInLastMonthInvalid: Days worked must be between 1 and 31.
errors.monthsFor13Invalid: Months worked must be between 1 and 12.
errors.monthsForVacationInvalid: Vacation months must be between 0 and 11.
